Terms of Use

Terms of use and copyright notes for Seasonal Observatory.

Original essays, observation checklists, page design, and editorial organization belong to Seasonal Observatory unless a page says otherwise. Public institutional references are used as linked sources and fact checks, not as copied articles.

When quoting this site, keep the page title, URL, and source note. Please contact the editors if a correction is needed.

Seasonal Observatory

Original seasonal field notes, source cards, and city-scale observation guides for a long-term solar-terms site.
